name: discover-verify-summarize
description: Stage-first read-only recipe: discover facts for the runtime task, verify them against repository evidence, then summarize.

stages.prompt: Discover facts needed to answer the runtime task. Do not modify files. Return factual bullet points with file paths and no recommendations.

Using Source Stage Context, verify the discovered facts against repository evidence. Flag unsupported or stale claims. Do not modify files. Return Verified, Corrected, and Unsupported sections with file-path evidence.

Using Source Stage Context and the runtime task, produce a concise grounded summary. Do not modify files. Return Markdown with sections: Answer, Core evidence, Relevant files, Caveats, Where to start.

useWhen: discover facts then verify then summarize
